data.name: Account Creation Line 1
data.value: Glrglmrlgmgla mrlgmrrrrgl mrlg rrglrulgargrlrgl glarlrglargl glublrgl glorggrglargl plglrglgrrr.

data.name: Account Creation Line 2
data.value: Blgrlrgl mrlg glrglrgrlmgla blublurggrrr, mrogl, glorggrglargl mrrglmurgl prglprglrgl.

data.name: Account Creation?
data.comment: Button that pops up explination of account creation process

data.name: Chart Type
data.comment: Chart Types = single, double, co op

data.name: Phoenix Import Saving Progress
data.comment: I.E 4/192 Uploaded. 3:29 Remaining. 2 Failed to record

data.name: Public
data.comment: (on/off, if account is set to public)

data.name: Recorded On
data.comment: I.E Recorded on 12/6/2023 (I don't support date localization yet but will eventually)

data.name: Song Type
data.comment: Song Types = Arcade, Full Song, etc.

data.name: Unpassed ToDos
data.comment: I.E You have 19 level 24 charts marked To Do you haven't passed

data.name: Use Password 1
data.value: Mrglrgl mrgl magrgl PIUScores mrgllug gluburgglorg murlgrgl mrrglargrl mrrgl murgmrg grglrglrgl mrlgrgl murlg.

data.name: Use Password 2
data.value: Mrg mrg grrrgl rgrlmrlgmrrgl mrg rglurg glub murlgrgl murglargrgl argrlg grrrmrrgl, murlg mrgl magrgl rgl rgrgl glurgl murg glrglrgl murgll murlg urgmrg mrglrgl.

data.name: Use Password 3
data.value: Rgl rulggurgmrrr grglgrglgrrrrgl rgl https://piugame.com Mrg mrgl mglrgl murgmrg mrglgrgl argrlg mrrglubrgl grglrglrgl. Glrglrgl murglar mglrgl gurgrgl mrg blubmrrr murgmrg urgmrgl Murglargrgl/Grrrmrrgl. Urgmrg mrgl mrgblub-grglurgrgl mrlgargl arglgl murlg argl rgl grarrgrlgrrr-murgmrg prglplgl grglrglrgl.

data.name: Use Password 4
data.value: Blubargrl glrgl, prglprglblgrl blgrlargl mrglrgl murgbagl argrlg argrgl murlgrgl grglrglrgl mrgl grrrgl mrrglubgl arglmrgl.

data.name: Qualifier Submit Phrase 1
data.value: Murlg mrg grrrgl mrogl rgl brgl mrrr murg rgl urgmrg mrglrgl grglurg. Rgrgl mrg murglargrgl rgl murgargrl argrlblgrlmurgmurgrgl.

data.name: Qualifier Submit Phrase 2
data.value: Mrglrgl argl murlgrgl urgrulg arglgrrr! Murglrrglplgl mrgla prgl murlgrgl Murglargrgl argl rglglorg glrglglrgl grglrgl Discord argrlg Start.GG.

data.name: Level/Players
data.comment: Combined level/player-count input on the new-chart admin form.

data.name: Video info is not formatted correctly
data.value: Glarurg mrgurgl argl grrrgl gurgmrrr arglmrgl

data.name: Updated X Y
data.comment: {0} = song name, {1} = difficulty string (e.g. "S17"). Snackbar after a chart save on /ChartUpdate.

data.name: Huge thank you for KyleTT for compiling this information from FEFEMZ's recordings.
data.value: Gurgmrrr mrgl murlg mrlgrgl KyleTT mrlgrgl plglgrglmglamrogl mrglrgl glorglurg blgrl FEFEMZ's murgblub.
data.comment: Double space between "FEFEMZ's" and "recordings" preserved verbatim from source.

data.name: Note that this information is not final until referenced against actual released mix.
data.value: Mrrglurg rglmrgl mrglrgl glorglurg argl grrrgl mrrglub urglrgl blubbrgl grgl arglmrg grglmrglgurg mrgla.

data.name: Disclaimer: This list is being refined, some charts are missing step artists and some may have incorrect artists.
data.value: Mrrrglub: Mrglrgl glrglmrg argl brglrgl arglglar, grgl mrglrglrgl argrlg grrrmrg rglmrgl glargrlrgl mrrgl grgl mglar magrgl grrrargl glargrlrgl.

data.name: Disclaimer: This data was data-mined in NX2 and Prime, it is unconfirmed how accurate it is today.
data.value: Mrrrglub: Mrglrgl glubglrgl mragl glubglrgl-murg murg NX2 mrrgl Rulg, rgl argl glrglblgrlgrglrgrl grarrgrl rglmrlg rgl argl urg.

data.name: Note Count from Full Life to Death/Threshold based on Combo between Breaks
data.value: Mrrglurg Grglrgl blgrl Blubmrrr Murggrgl rgl Murgmrrr/Grrrmurg grarrgl urg Lrgl murggrl Brglubrgl

data.name: Notes to Full Life From Start of Song (50%)
data.value: Mrrglurgrgl rgl Blubmrrr Murggrgl Blgrl Start glub Glurgl (50%)

data.name: Starting life is 500, visible Life (Rainbow life bar) is 1000.
data.value: Murgargrlrgl murggrgl argl 500, urggrgl Murggrgl (Rgl murggrgl lrglglar) argl 1000.
data.comment: Double space between "visible" and "Life" preserved verbatim from source.

data.name: Lifebar overflows exponentially by level, up to about a 2350 overflow at level 28.
data.value: Murggrglblur gluburggrlrgl arglglubgurgblub blgrl rglmrgl, glrgl rgl argrlg mrg 2350 gluburggrl argl rglmrgl 28.

data.name: By default, bads lose 50 health, misses lose 250 health (at ~100% health).
data.value: Blgrl mrrglub, grrrglrgl rglrglgurg 50 murglargrl, grrrmrgrgl rglrglgurg 250 murglargrl (argl ~100% murglargrl).

data.name: Misses lose LESS health the further beneath 1000 health you are at (at 0 life you would lose 20 health for a miss)
data.value: Grrrmrgrgl rglrglgurg LESS murglargrl mrgl glarargrlrgl glrgl 1000 murglargrl murlg argrlg argl (argl 0 murggrgl murlg mrglargrl rglrglgurg 20 murglargrl mrlgrgl mrg grrrmrg)

data.name: By default at high combo, perfects gain 9.6 life, greats gain 8 life, goods gain 0 life.
data.value: Blgrl mrrglub argl argargrl lrgl, mrglubrgl glorgrgl 9.6 murggrgl, mrrglubrgl glorgrgl 8 murggrgl, glorgarglglar glorgrgl 0 murggrgl.

data.name: This is modified by a multiplier that is almost entirely reset on a miss, and decreased drastically on a bad.
data.value: Mrglrgl argl argrlurgmurggrrr blgrl mrg mrrglrgrl rglmrgl argl brglmrlgrgl blubblgrlmglamrrgl rgrgl urg mrg grrrmrg, mrrgl murglrgllrglmgla rrglrglmrogl urg mrg grrrgl.

data.name: Each perfect or great you get increases the multiplier by a minor amount.
data.value: Mrlgrl mrglub argrlg mrrglub murlg gurg lrgllrglrgrlglarrgl mrgl mrrglrgrl blgrl mrg rulgprglprgl mrrglmurgrgl.

data.name: Effectively, this means that your life gain is heavily affected by combo, reaching maximum gain at ~40-50 combo.
data.value: Blgrlglorgbrgl, mrglrgl argrlrgl rglmrgl murlgrgl murggrgl glorgrgl argl glargrrrglorg brglblgrlplglrgrl blgrl lrgl, urgrulgmrrr mrrrgl glorgrgl argl ~40-50 lrgl.

data.name: To recover from Bads you require 17-21 combo per Bad. Bads typically let you live for 3x as long as misses.
data.value: Rgl blgrlmrlg blgrl Grrrglrgl murlg gurg 17-21 lrgl grgl Grrrgl. Grrrglrgl argllrgl arglgrrrglubrgl murlg mroglgurg mrlgrgl 3urggrrrmrogl argl mrgl argl grrrmrgrgl.

data.name: To remain alive you need to maintain 17-21 combo per Miss.
data.value: Rgl rgl gurgplgl murlg mrogl rgl mroglrglgurgargrl 17-21 lrgl grgl Grrrmrg.

data.name: To remain at 50% visible life, you need 37-46 combo per Miss.
data.value: Rgl rgl argl 50% urggrgl murggrgl, murlg mrogl 37-46 lrgl grgl Grrrmrg.

data.name: To remain at Rainbow Life, you 46-55 combo per Miss.
data.value: Rgl rgl argl Rgl Murggrgl, murlg 46-55 lrgl grgl Grrrmrg.
data.comment: Likely missing "need" between "you" and "46-55" in source; preserved verbatim.

data.name: Bads at low health let you live for roughly 3x as long as misses, this gap increases the higher the life threshold you want to keep, up to misses punishing 6x as much when maintaining 100% visual life.
data.value: Grrrglrgl argl lrgl murglargrl arglgrrrglubrgl murlg mroglgurg mrlgrgl argrlmrrrlrgl 3urggrrrmrogl argl mrgl argl grrrmrgrgl, mrglrgl prglmroglmurg lrgllrglrgrlglarrgl mrgl argargrl mrgl murggrgl grrrmurg murlg plgllrglplglrgl rgl murglargl, glrgl rgl grrrmrgrgl rrglglub 6urggrrrmrogl argl mrrrrrglglrgl arglrgl glarlurgmurg 100% glorgmglaargl murggrgl.

data.name: TLDR: Misses matter less at low life, but are always significantly more punishing than Bads.
data.value: TLDR: Grrrmrgrgl plgl lrrgl argl lrgl murggrgl, blubgl argrlg mrglrglrgl gurgmrlgmrrgl mrrglrgl rrglglub grargrl Grrrglrgl.

data.name: Misses or back-to-back Bads early in a run put you in a terribly position for maintaining life, as they reset your life gain multiplier and require you to combo ~40-50 to regain it. Start runs strong for increased success rates.
data.value: Grrrmrgrgl argrlg mrrgl-rgl-mrrgl Grrrglrgl urgrgl murg mrg prgl rglmurg murlg murg mrg mrrglargrlmglamrrr mroglmrglrglrgl mrlgrgl glarlurgmurg murggrgl, argl glurg rgrgl murlgrgl murggrgl glorgrgl mrrglrgrl mrrgl gurg murlg rgl lrgl ~40-50 rgl mrrglmrrr rgl. Start mrrglglrgl grrrbrgllrgl mrlgrgl mroglgrrrgrglmurgl urgmurglmurg rrglrglrgl.

data.name: When at 12% or lower visual life, a miss gives less life loss than a bad, but inhibits your recovery severely. This only really matters for notes at the end of a song or before guaranteed 100+ combo sections.
data.value: Arglrgl argl 12% argrlg gurgargrlbrgl glorgmglaargl murggrgl, mrg grrrmrg rulgmrgl lrrgl murggrgl grrrglub grargrl mrg grrrgl, blubgl brglmrglgrarurg murlgrgl mrrglubmrg glorgmrrr. Mrglrgl mglrgl mgla mrrrmurgl mrlgrgl mrrglurgrgl argl mrgl glubargl glub mrg glurgl argrlg glrgl murgbrgllrglrulg 100+ lrgl murgblgrlglrglglub.

data.name: Try to maintain 17-21 combo per bad.
data.value: Arglgr rgl mroglrglgurgargrl 17-21 lrgl grgl grrrgl.

data.name: Try to maintain 40-50 combo per miss.
data.value: Arglgr rgl mroglrglgurgargrl 40-50 lrgl grgl grrrmrg.

data.name: Lifebars are weird.
data.comment: Quote attributed to Zelllooo on the Life Calculator page.

data.name: Team Infinitesimal, data-mine from NX2 + Prime
data.value: Glubgrarmurg Glorgrglglrgl, glubglrgl-glarbrgl blgrl NX2 + Rulg

data.name: Some players already maintain scores via Spreadsheets.
data.value: Grgl murglargrlrgl glrgl mroglrglgurgargrl grglrglrgl murgllurgglrgl Glubglrglrglrgl.

data.name: In some of those cases, it may be faster to upload a Spreadsheet instead of manually inputting thousands of grades.
data.value: Murg grgl glub rglmrglrgl glorgmrrrgurg, rgl mglar brgl arglbrgl rgl murlgrgl mrg Glubglrglrgl gurgrrgl glub murgplgl urggrglrgrl urgmurgl glub grglarglrgl.

data.name: After the upload, if there are some rows/charts/attempts that did not upload correctly, you will be given the option to download a list of the failed rows and the reason they failed.
data.value: Mrgl mrgl murlgrgl, arglgl argrlrrgl argrlg grgl rgrlmrlgmrrrrgl/mrglrglrgl/lrglglargurgblgrlrgl rglmrgl mrggl grrrgl murlgrgl arglmrgl, murlg mrgl brgl mrglrgrl mrgl mglaglrglprgl rgl murlgrgl mrg glrglmrg glub mrgl grrrglrglrgl rgrlmrlgmrrrrgl mrrgl mrgl mrrglargl glurg grrrglrglrgl.

data.name: Spreadsheet is uploading and being processed...
data.value: Glubglrglrgl argl arglrgrlglorgrgl mrrgl brglrgl urgrgrlmroglmrrgl...

data.name: XXLetterGrade
data.comment: Column header on the XX-score upload preview grid; matches the legacy property name.

data.name: IsBroken
data.comment: Column header on the XX-score upload preview grid; matches the legacy property name.

data.name: If you leave this page or cancel, the upload will stop but you will not lose any scores that have already been recorded from your upload.
data.value: Arglgl murlg blgrlargl mrglrgl murgbagl argrlg grrrmrg, mrgl murlgrgl mrgl mglamrrrgrrrrgl blubgl murlg mrgl grrrgl rglrglgurg argrgl grglrglrgl rglmrgl magrgl glrgl brglgl gurgmgla blgrl murlgrgl murlgrgl.

data.name: X/Y Uploaded. Z Remaining. W Failed to record
data.comment: Save progress status. {0}=saved count, {1}=total, {2}=time remaining (m:ss), {3}=failed count

data.name: You had a few charts that were not able to be downloaded. You can download a CSV of the failures to make adjustments and try again.
data.value: Murlg magr mrg grgl mrglrglrgl rglmrgl mrglargl grrrgl blgrlmrrrglrgl rgl brgl glrglmurgblub. Murlg glargrl murlgrgl mrg CSV glub mrgl grrrglrglrgl rgl mrgla prglmrogl mrrgl arglgr plglglarplgl.

data.name: All charts you uploaded were successfully updated!
data.value: Glrgl mrglrglrgl murlg prglglubargrl mrglargl lurgurgrrgl mrglargrl!

data.name: You somehow ended up in a state between realities. Refresh the page to try again.
data.value: Murlg glubrgl rglgrgl glrgl murg mrg rglargl murggrl prglglarrulg. Mrrglurg mrgl murgbagl rgl arglgr plglglarplgl.

data.name: Some adjustments to account for typos or difference in naming conventions have been accounted for. Song Names are Case Insensitive. (Note that some of these look the same because they are whitespace adjustments)
data.value: Grgl prglmrogl rgl mrrglargrl mrlgrgl grarglorgglubrgl argrlg grarplglrgrl murg rulgargrl mrrrmrlg magrgl brglgl glubbrglrrglargl mrlgrgl. Glurgl Mrglargrgl argrlg Mrglmrrr Glrglblubrgl. (Mrrglurg rglmrgl grgl glub mrglrglrgl rulgprgl mrgl mglargrl mrrglrgl glurg argrlg mglamrrglglrgl prglmrogl)

data.name: File cannot be larger than 10 MB
data.value: Gluburg grrrglrgl brgl mrrgrgl grargrl 10 MB

data.name: There was an unknown error while parsing the file
data.value: Argrlrrgl mragl mrg urglrgl grrrargrl murgll grargurglurgrgl mrgl gluburg

data.name: Wouldn't You Like To Know
data.comment: Easter-egg tooltip shown for the user "CLEARALL18SORQUIT"

data.name: Site constructed and maintained by DrMurloc
data.value: Urgmrg plglglubargl mrrgl glarrulgargrlrgl blgrl DrMurloc

data.name: Original Concept (excel score tracking) Constructed by KyleTT
data.value: Mrlggrglargl Arglglub (mrrglurggrgl grglrgl brglrulgrgl) Plglglubargl blgrl KyleTT

data.name: LetterDifficulties
data.comment: Page title on /Experiments/LetterDifficulties; the source has no space between "Letter" and "Difficulties".

data.name: Private User - X
data.comment: {0} = comparison-score number. Listed for users who have set their profile private.

data.name: ChartScoring
data.comment: Page title on /Experiments/ChartScoring; the source has no space between "Chart" and "Scoring".

data.name: All players with scores within the target folder are assigned weights based on how close their competitive level is to X.
data.value: Glrgl murglargrlrgl grgl grglrglrgl murgargrl mrgl mrglargrl glubmurg argrlg brglrulgmurglblub glubgrgrlrgl grarrgl urg grarrgrl grlorgl glurgrgl grrrmrrglmrg rglmrgl argl rgl {0}.

data.name: Highlighted players have a recorded score on the chart in question.
data.value: Murglmroglrgl murglargrlrgl magrgl mrg gurgmgla grglrgl urg mrgl mrglrgl murg mrrgl?.

data.name: Anonymous
data.comment: Display name shown for users who have set their profile private.

data.name: Competitively
data.comment: Word used in player-weight rows on /Experiments/ChartScoring (e.g. "(Competitively 12.34)").

data.name: The target folder and the three surrounding are provided weighted average scores utilizing the player weights above.
data.value: Mrgl mrglargrl glubmurg mrrgl mrgl mrrrgl argrlrgl argrlg glubmrrgl blubgurg mrrglmrg grglrglrgl mrrglgurgmrglmrgl mrgl murglargrl glubgrgrlrgl argargrl.

data.name: These averages are shifted away from the level in question by .5 of a standard deviation within their respective folder to make sure level changes are better represented by the bulk of a surrounding folder.
data.value: Mrglrglrgl mrrglmrgrgl argrlg mglamrgl murgblgrl blgrl mrgl rglmrgl murg mrrgl? blgrl .5 glub mrg lrglmrglmrrr argrlplglargrl murgargrl glurgrgl blgrlargl glubmurg rgl mrgla prgl rglmrgl mrglargrlrgl argrlg urgmrrr plgllrglgrrrgrar blgrl mrgl mrrrgurg glub mrg argrlrgl glubmurg.

data.name: The chart in question has its weighted average score projected onto the score distributions
data.value: Mrgl mrglrgl murg mrrgl? magrgl rglrgl blubgurg mrrglmrg grglrgl mrrglurg mrgl mrgl grglrgl glubmrrglrglrgl

data.name: There was not enough data for the targeted player level to evaluate a final difficulty.
data.value: Argrlrrgl mragl grrrgl plglmglaglrgl glubglrgl mrlgrgl mrgl rrglblgrlmrglmrrgl murglargrl rglmrgl rgl rglrrgl mrg mrrglub grlgrgl.

data.name: The weighted average for this chart is better than the average for a X.
data.value: Mrgl blubgurg mrrglmrg mrlgrgl mrglrgl mrglrgl argl urgmrrr grargrl mrgl mrrglmrg mrlgrgl mrg {0}.

data.name: In this case, the chart is determined to be below by X utilizing standard deviations in the Y folder.
data.value: Murg mrglrgl mrglmrrr, mrgl mrglrgl argl urggurgprglbrgl rgl brgl blubgrl blgrl {0} mrrglgurgmrglmrgl lrglmrglmrrr mrglargrl murg mrgl {1} glubmurg.

data.name: The weighted average for this chart is worst than the average for a X.
data.value: Mrgl blubgurg mrrglmrg mrlgrgl mrglrgl mrglrgl argl grrrglubgl grargrl mrgl mrrglmrg mrlgrgl mrg {0}.
data.comment: Source spelling preserved verbatim ("worst" rather than "worse"). {0} = low-level integer.

data.name: In this case, the chart is determined to be above by X utilizing standard deviations in the Y folder.
data.value: Murg mrglrgl mrglmrrr, mrgl mrglrgl argl urggurgprglbrgl rgl brgl argargrl blgrl {0} mrrglgurgmrglmrgl lrglmrglmrrr mrglargrl murg mrgl {1} glubmurg.

data.name: Determined to be X between Y and Z

At this point, it's identified that this chart has no players with a weight of .5 or higher (within 1 level). The chart is marked as not having a scoring level as any estimation would be based on missing data.
data.value: Argl mrglrgl glubgrgl, rglrgl glrglargl rglmrgl mrglrgl mrglrgl magrgl grrrgl murglargrlrgl grgl mrg glubgrgrl glub .5 argrlg argargrl (murgargrl 1 rglmrgl). Mrgl mrglrgl argl mrogl argl grrrgl blgrl mrg grglrglmrg rglmrgl argl argrgl grglprglmrglmrgl mrglargrl brgl grarrgl urg grrrmrg glubglrgl.

data.name: The listed scoring difficulty is calculated for players competitively playing in the officially listed folder for a chart.
data.value: Mrgl mrrrrulg grglrglmrg grlgrgl argl blgrlblgrlplgllrgl mrlgrgl murglargrlrgl blgrlmurglblubmrrrrgl brgllrgl murg mrgl argrlmrrrgrglmrlg mrrrrulg glubmurg mrlgrgl mrg mrglrgl.

data.name: The outcome of this algorithm has drastically different results for players at different levels though
data.value: Mrgl lrglmrlgargl glub mrglrgl mrrglglub magrgl rrglrglmrogl argrglrgl grglubrgl mrlgrgl murglargrlrgl argl argrglrgl rulg mglargl

data.name: This is intended. There are charts that are relatively easier to score to others in the folder for players just pushing into the folder, but are harder for higher level players to perfect.
data.value: Mrglrgl argl argrlglrgl. Argrlrrgl argrlg mrglrglrgl rglmrgl argrlg mrglglubgrgl mrrglrgl rgl grglrgl rgl argrglrgl murg mrgl glubmurg mrlgrgl murglargrlrgl gurglrgl lrglplglgrrr gluburgglorg mrgl glubmurg, blubgl argrlg grrrmrrglrgl mrlgrgl argargrl rglmrgl murglargrlrgl rgl mrglub.

data.name: Scoring Level by Player Competitive Level
data.value: Grglrglmrg Rglmrgl blgrl Murglargrl Grrrmrrglmrg Rglmrgl

data.name: For CoOps, scoring level is simply the lowest level player who's been able to pass the chart.
data.value: Mrlgrgl Mrrglurgrgl, grglrglmrg rglmrgl argl grarrrglblub mrgl lrglrgl rglmrgl murglargrl argl brglgl blgrlmrrrglrgl rgl brglurg mrgl mrglrgl.

data.name: This isn't perfect, but until I have more data other algorithms haven't been successful at projecting CoOps onto difficulty levels
data.value: Mrglrgl glrglmrlg mrglub, blubgl urglrgl Mrg magrgl mrrglrgl glubglrgl argrgl mrrglglubrgl blgrlgrglgrrr brglgl mglalrgl argl mrlgmrrr Mrrglurgrgl mrgl grlgrgl rulg

data.name: No one has passed this CoOp yet so no level is assigned.
data.value: Grrrgl mrg magrgl brglurgrgl mrglrgl Mrrglurg rrglrulglrgl mogrl grrrgl rglmrgl argl brglrulgmurglblub.

data.name: This gives this chart a scoring level of: X
data.value: Mrglrgl rulgmrgl mrglrgl mrglrgl mrg grglrglmrg rglmrgl glub: {0}
data.comment: {0} = lowest passing player's competitive level (2 decimals).

data.name: As
data.comment: Plural of letter grade A — column header counting A grades.

data.name: Score Rankings (the colored scores) are based on comparisons to similarly skilled players.
data.value: Grglrgl Grglarglrglrgl (mrgl argrlglar grglrglrgl) argrlg grarrgl urg murglplglargrlrgrl rgl rulggurggrgl brglmrogl murglargrlrgl.

data.name: The higher percent of players in your range that you perform better than, the better the color:
data.value: Mrgl argargrl mrrglargl glub murglargrlrgl murg murlgrgl murgargrl rglmrgl murlg mrrglbrglrgl urgmrrr grargrl, mrgl urgmrrr mrgl glarblub:

data.name: Similarly skilled players to you for Singles:
data.value: Rulggurggrgl brglmrogl murglargrlrgl rgl murlg mrlgrgl Mrglargrlrgl:

data.name: Similarly skilled players to you for Doubles (CoOp charts use doubles competitive level):
data.value: Rulggurggrgl brglmrogl murglargrlrgl rgl murlg mrlgrgl Argrlargl (Mrrglurg mrglrglrgl urgmrg argrlargl grrrmrrglmrg rglmrgl):

data.name: Always
data.comment: Fallback for tournament StartDate when not set.

data.name: Never
data.comment: Fallback for tournament EndDate when not set.

data.name: Start Date: X
data.comment: {0} = formatted date string or the localized "Always" fallback.

data.name: End Date: X
data.comment: {0} = formatted date string or the localized "Never" fallback.

data.name: Players have X to play charts. You are allowed to finish the song you are on when your time runs out. Your total score is total combined score of all charts you play.
data.value: Murglargrlrgl magrgl {0} rgl plargl mrglrglrgl. Murlg argrlg glrglmglarrgl rgl mrrglubgl mrgl glurgl murlg argrlg urg arglrgl murlgrgl murgll mrrglglrgl grglglrglblgrlrgl. Murlgrgl glrglmrrgl grglrgl argl glrglmrrgl mrrglglub grglrgl glub glrgl mrglrglrgl murlg plargl.

data.name: Broken scores get a multiplier of X
data.value: Brglubrgl grglrglrgl gurg mrg mrrglrgrl glub {0}

data.name: Songs will have score adjusted based on song length (treating 2 minutes as baseline)
data.value: Glurglrgl mrgl magrgl grglrgl prglmroglmrogl grarrgl urg glurgl lrglurg (lurgrulglrglglrgl 2 murgllrgl argl glubargl)

data.name: are
data.comment: Used in "Repeated charts {are/are not} allowed." sentence on the rules dialog.

data.name: are not
data.comment: Used in "Repeated charts {are/are not} allowed." sentence on the rules dialog.

data.name: Repeated charts X allowed.
data.comment: {0} = "are" or "are not" (also localized as separate keys).

data.name: Players (Paste UserId from Account Page if not Public)
data.value: Murglargrlrgl (Prargl UserId blgrl Mrrglargrl Murgbagl arglgl grrrgl Arglmrrgl)

data.name: This user does not exist. Double check the User Id
data.value: Mrglrgl murglar mrgrgl grrrgl mrrglgrar. Murgrgrl grglarglglar mrgl Murglar ID

data.name: X Charts
data.comment: {0} = chart count integer. Button label on /Tournament/Stamina/{id}.

data.name: Adjust Scores to Song Duration (uses 2 minutes as average chart duration)
data.value: Glrglmrg Grglrglrgl rgl Glurgl Murgllrgl (urgmrgrgl 2 murgllrgl argl mrrglmrg mrglrgl murgllrgl)

data.name: Continous Modifier Scale (modifier increments between letter grades)
data.value: Prglgurg Mrrglblub Grarrgl (mrrglblub arglglorgglrgl murggrl lrglargl grglarglrgl)
data.comment: Source spelling preserved verbatim ("Continous" rather than "Continuous").

data.name: Perfect Score Modifier (Acts as a letter grade beyond SSS+)
data.value: Mrglub Grglrgl Mrrglblub (Mrglplgl argl mrg lrglargl grglargl urgmrrr SSS+)

data.name: Player To Test (Must Be Set To Public)
data.value: Murglargrl Rgl Grrgl (Mrrrgl Brgl Argl Rgl Arglmrrgl)

data.name: Road to BITE (Monthly Leaderboard July 8th - August 4th)
data.value: Glubrulgblub rgl BITE (Murgllargl Arglmrgl Rulg 8rglrgrlplgl - Mrrrbluburg 4rglrgrlplgl)
data.comment: Date-window heading used pre-BITE; specific to a fixed annual event window.

data.name: Co-Op
data.comment: Used as a select-item label on /WeeklyCharts. Distinct from the existing "CoOp" key (no hyphen) used elsewhere — both spellings appear in source verbatim.

data.name: What Should I Play
data.comment: Page title (no question mark in source).

data.name: What Should I Play?
data.comment: h3 header on the same page (with question mark in source).

data.name: Top 50 X
data.comment: {0} = chart type (e.g. "Singles" / "Doubles"). Tooltip on the crown icon for top-50 charts.

data.name: I Just Want to Hide The Chart
data.value: Mrg Gurglrgl Plgllrglplglrgl rgl Glubgrl Mrgl Mrglrgl

data.name: The Category Isn't Interesting to Me'
data.value: Mrgl Glargrl Glrglmrlg Murglmroglplgl rgl Mrgmrg'
data.comment: Source has a stray trailing apostrophe — preserved verbatim.
